basis: Local seed identifies a legendary BG creature.
Scryfall card context and EDHREC Commander context exist.
WotC/Playgroup set context supports the Secrets of Strixhaven Commander release.

source_limit_notes: Do not merge this card with older Dina lifegain-drain assumptions.

themes.name: golgari_sacrifice_once_per_turn_draw
themes.notes: Dina draws from creature sacrifice only once each turn, so repeatable sacrifice across turns matters more than one huge sacrifice chain.

themes.name: high_power_sacrifice_lifegain_counters
themes.notes: The activated ability rewards sacrificing a high-power creature for life and +1/+1 counters.

themes.name: fodder_recursion_engine
themes.notes: Recursive bodies keep card draw and activated ability online.

themes.name: aristocrats_secondary
themes.notes: Aristocrat payoffs are useful, but the once-per-turn trigger prevents pure spam from being the main plan.

examples: lifegain-drain-only package with no creature sacrifice
avoid_patterns.reason: Dina, Essence Brewer has a different oracle text and incentives.

examples: all sacrifice loops assuming every sacrifice draws
avoid_patterns.reason: The draw trigger happens only once each turn.

examples: no high-power creatures for the activated ability
avoid_patterns.reason: The tap ability scales with sacrificed creature power.
